evidence.grepResults: SKILL.md: status lifecycle defined (line 205). orchestrator.md: manages transitions — pending at init (line 45), in-progress at dispatch (line 58), completed/failed after worker (line 66), gate at completion (line 79). engine.py: _VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS enforces programmatically (lines 381-383).

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed. All cross-area lifecycle assertions verified through content-check (ripgrep) against the actual repo files. The full lifecycle chain from init through dispatch, validation, and cleanup is consistently documented across SKILL.md, orchestrator.md, worker.md, validator.md, exit-mission.md, CLAUDE.md, and enforced in hooks/phase-guard.py + hooks/engine.py.
